alt: Multi-deck cruise ship atrium with curving glass-rail staircases and the Seaside Bar visible at the lowest level
description: The four-deck atrium aboard MSC Seaside. The Seaside Bar is visible at the bottom, immediately outside the Seashore Restaurant entrance on Deck 5; the Ipanema Restaurant entry is one deck up on Deck 6 Copacabana. Crystal-lit curving staircases connect the decks, and the forward windows look out over the sea.
title: MSC Seaside Atrium
